heading: Agricultural exports of beneficiary developing countries
label: 2466 Agricultural exports of beneficiary developing countries
text: The appropriate agencies of the United States shall assist beneficiary developing countries to develop and implement measures designed to assure that the agricultural sectors of their economies are not directed to export markets to the detriment of the production of foodstuffs for their citizenry.
